allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Fix FSM arrival-state deadlock and waiter infinite-walk loop' --body ' *)

Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title \\"Fix FSM arrival-state deadlock and waiter infinite-walk loop\\" --body \\"## Summary\\n\\n- **base_fsm.gd** — Reverted to direct threshold movement. NavAgent-based movement caused a hard deadlock: without a baked navmesh, navigation_finished never fires so _is_moving stays true forever and no state ever transitions.\\n- **waiter_fsm.gd** — WALK_TO_WAITER_TABLE was passing itself as the arrival state, looping infinitely. Fixed to transition to PICKUP_BURGER.\\n- Removed ~240-line commented-out duplicate blocks from all three FSM files.\\n\\n## Defensive improvements in base_fsm.gd\\n\\n- Removed redundant has_reached_target\(\) guard from arrival condition\\n- Added print log inside arrival block for debugger visibility\\n- _finish_turn\(\) uses call_deferred to defer turn_complete out of _physics_process\\n- Added double-fire guard in _finish_turn\(\)\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Customer walks to seat and transitions to IDLE_SEATED on arrival\\n- [ ] Waiter completes full delivery loop — turn_complete fires at end\\n- [ ] Arrival print logs appear in Godot output for each movement leg\\n- [ ] No infinite movement loops for customer or waiter\\n- [ ] Round manager advances normally\\n\\n Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)\\"")

Bash(powershell -Command "gh pr create --title 'Fix FSM arrival-state deadlock and waiter infinite-walk loop' --body 'See commit message for full details. Fixes: \(1\) base_fsm navmesh deadlock — reverted to direct threshold movement so arrival state block fires reliably; \(2\) waiter infinite walk loop — WALK_TO_WAITER_TABLE now transitions to PICKUP_BURGER on arrival; \(3\) removed ~240-line commented-out duplicate blocks from all three FSM files. Generated with Claude Code.'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\brand\\AppData\\Local' -Filter 'Godot*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files' -Filter 'Godot*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName; Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Users\\brand\\AppData\\Roaming\\SPB_Data' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")
